title: Drops of Jupiter
why_this_song: Drops of Jupiter by Train (2001) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 7 times; first heard in: "But tell me, did you sail across the sun?"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Did you make it to the Milky Way to see the lights all faded"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "And tell me, did you fall for a shooting star?"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "And tell me, did you fall for a shooting star?"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "And tell me, did you fall for a shooting star?"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And did you finally get the chance
To dance along the light of day?
Now that she's back in the atmosphere
With drops of Jupiter in her hair
She acts like summer and walks like rain
Reminds me that there's a time to change, hey

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "tell" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "tell" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "milky" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "milky" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Now that she's back in the atmosphere
And head back to the Milky Way?
While you were looking for yourself?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: With drops of Jupiter in her hair
Your best friend always sticking up for you

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Drops of Jupiter" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Drops of Jupiter" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Drops of Jupiter", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Drops of Jupiter", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Drops of Jupiter" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Drops of Jupiter" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
